mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE DATE(member_regdate) = CURDATE();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_status = '정상'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_status = '탈퇴';

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name_ko AS categoryName, IFNULL(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS totalSales, IFNULL(COUNT(r.review_id), 0) AS totalReviews, (IFNULL(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) * 0.7 + IFNULL(COUNT(r.review_id), 0) * 0.3) AS score FROM category c JOIN book b ON c.category_id = b.category_id LEFT JOIN orderitem oi ON b.book_id = oi.book_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN review r ON b.book_id = r.book_id AND r.review_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name_ko ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title AS bookTitle, c.category_name_ko AS categoryName, b.cover_image AS coverImage, SUM(o.quantity) AS totalSales FROM book b JOIN orderitem o ON b.book_id = o.book_id JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY b.book_id ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title AS bookTitle, c.category_name_ko AS categoryName, b.cover_image AS coverImage, COUNT(r.review_id) AS totalReviews, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score), 1) AS avgRating FROM book b JOIN review r ON b.book_id = r.book_id JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY b.book_id HAVING totalReviews >= 2 ORDER BY avgRating DESC, totalReviews DESC LIMIT 5
